summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of trifold brochure application. All features working perfectly - landing page with preview iframes, standalone brochure.html with all 6 panels and images, button functionality, and print-ready format.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at / with header, preview iframes, and action buttons
Brochure page loads at /brochure.html with complete content
Page 1 (Outer Spread): Panel 5 with desk image and 'Восстановление ресурса' text
Page 1 (Outer Spread): Panel 6 with QR code and contact information
Page 1 (Outer Spread): Panel 1 with 'АРХИТЕКТУРА ЗДОРОВЬЯ' title
Page 2 (Inner Spread): Panel 2 with 'За гранью симптомов' text and doctors image
Page 2 (Inner Spread): Panel 3 with needles image and 'Системная диагностика' text
Page 2 (Inner Spread): Panel 4 with 'Микрохирургия без скальпеля' text and spine image
All 6 images load correctly: drone.jpg, desk.jpg, doctors.jpg, needles.jpg, spine.jpg, qrcode.jpg
Control bar with 'Экспорт в PDF' button visible and functional
'Открыть буклет для печати' button links correctly to /brochure.html
Price table with procedure costs visible in Panel 5
Preview iframes working correctly for both outer and inner spreads
Responsive design and print-ready format functioning properly
